summary: Complete transaction-based architecture design for ads performance tracking. Resolves Q2 (unmapped spend → UNATTRIBUTED transactions), Q3 (retroactive fill → auto-backfill on first mapping), Q7 (Google Ads corrections → ADJUSTMENT transactions). Includes full transaction schema, 7 transaction types, hourly sync flow diagram, worked example with 12 transactions across a day showing remap at 14:00, and derivation formulas for all KPI metrics.
